source_intake_record.raw_question_text: In the circuit shown in the figure, given \( R_1 = 4 \Omega \), \( R_p \) is a variable resistor, the electromotive force of the power supply \( E = 10 \text{ V} \), and the internal resistance \( r = 1 \Omega \), what is the maximum power dissipated by \( R_p \)? ________W.
